_output_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — target filesystem path for the marshalled artifact.

_phase_status.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — workflow state (drives C4 requirements-table branch).

field_name.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — Zod field path emitted in this column.

header_text.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — text printed in the header row.

width.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — preferred column width in Excel units.

type_hint.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — Excel cell-type hint for the marshaller.

required.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — whether marshaller should error on null.

items.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — single column-layout instruction (first-class per C5).

_columns_plan.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — optional layout instructions (first-class per C5).

field_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:methodology-drift-check — dotted path within the phase schema (e.g., "rows[].math_derivation").

introduced_in.description: x-ui-surface=internal:methodology-drift-check — schema semver where this field was added.

rationale.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — reviewer-facing reason the insertion was made.

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — KB file that motivated the insertion, if any.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — methodology insertion (first-class per C5).

_insertions.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — optional methodology insertions applied to this phase (first-class per C5).

phase_number.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — methodology phase number (0-12) per plan §4.5.

phase_slug.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — URL-safe slug (e.g., "requirements-table"). Also the xlsx sheet slug.

phase_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — human-facing phase title (e.g., "Phase 6 — Extract Requirements Table").

schema_version.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — Zod schema semver (e.g., "1.0.0") for drift-detection.

project_id.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — parent project id; keys workbook + PDF filename.

project_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — project display name; rendered at top and used as xlsx workbook title.

author.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — emitting agent or human reviewer identifier.

generator.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — tool that produced this artifact (e.g., "product-helper@0.1.0").

revision.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — monotonic revision counter per (project, phase).

system_description.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — system description (required at handoff; Phase 0A GAP must be filled before Phase 11 emits).

module_2_handoff.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Upstream — path to M2 ffbd-handoff.json.

ffbd_pptx.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Upstream — optional path to FFBD PPTX.

ingestion_report.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Upstream — optional path to Phase 0A ingestion report.

upstream_artifacts.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Upstream — upstream artifacts this handoff cites.

block_id.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Functions — hierarchical block id (e.g., F.3.2.1).

name.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Functions — human-facing Title Case block name.

abstract_name.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Functions — snake_case abstract name (matches M2 functions[].name).

level.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Functions — hierarchy level for weighting.

parent_diagram.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Functions — diagram title this block belongs to.

uncertainty.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Functions — Phase 9 uncertainty marking.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Functions > Provenance — UC.R requirement id.

driving_requirements.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Functions > Provenance — requirements driving this function.

notes.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Functions — optional reviewer notes.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Functions — one flat entry in the functions_flat_list.

functions_flat_list.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Functions — every function from every diagram, flat.

criterion.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Criteria — criterion name (e.g., "Page Load Speed").

dimension.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Criteria — performance dimension.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Criteria — block id this criterion traces to.

driving_functions.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Criteria — FFBD functions that drive this criterion.

solution_independent.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Criteria — whether the criterion is solution-independent (required for M4 matrix rows).

suggested_kb_reference.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Criteria — KB file the criterion cites (matches softwareArchRefSchema 12-enum).

why_this_matters.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Criteria — one-sentence justification for criterion selection.

formula.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — LaTeX-like or plain-English formula (e.g., "p95 = base + queueing_delay(λ, μ)").

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — KB filename (matches softwareArchRefSchema or "inline") that sourced the formula.

result.description: x-ui-surface=section:Requirement Detail > Design Rationale — computed value, if the formula is evaluated at generation time.

summary.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Alternatives — one-line summary.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Alternatives — one alternative the Decision Matrix compares.

alternatives_to_compare.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Alternatives — ≥2 alternatives for M4 comparison.

name.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Uncertainty — block name.

color.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Uncertainty — red (highest risk — open questions).

unit.description: x-ui-surface=section:DM Handoff Dashboard > Sizing — unit fixed to req/s.
